Sample.Title: human_CSF_Ctrl_1

Channel.Extract-Protocol: Frozen CSF was thawed at 37°C in complete growth medium (10% FBS in RPMI), washed, and then processed as described in 23, with the modification that cells were not sorted due to high cell loss observed during this step; fresh CSF was processed directly. To generate single-cell libraries, cell suspensions were loaded onto the Chromium Single Cell Controller with the Chromium Single Cell 5′ Library & Gel Bead Kit v.1.1/v2 (both from 10X Genomics) in adherence to the manufacturer's guidelines. Chromium Single Cell 5′ Library & Gel Bead Kit v.1.1/v2 (both from 10X Genomics

Sample.Data-Processing: Seurat v5.1.0 in R v4.5.1 Assembly: GRCh38 Supplementary files format and content: h5 files for each sample

To generate single-cell libraries, cell suspensions were loaded onto the Chromium Single Cell Controller with the Chromium Single Cell 5′ Library & Gel Bead Kit v.1.1/v2 (both from 10X Genomics) in adherence to the manufacturer's guidelines. Sample.Data-Processing: Seurat v5.1.0 in R v4.5.1 Assembly: GRCh38 Supplementary files format and content: h5 files for each sample

Sample.Title: human_CSF_PPMS_6

Channel.Extract-Protocol: A minimum of 3 ml fresh CSF was centrifuged, and the supernatant was frozen separately. Fresh CSF was processed directly. To generate single-cell libraries, cell suspensions were loaded onto the Chromium Single Cell Controller with the Chromium Single Cell 5′ Library & Gel Bead Kit v.1.1/v2 (both from 10X Genomics) in adherence to the manufacturer's guidelines.The fresh PMS CSF samples were processed individually using the Single Cell 5’ Library Kit with a single index. Single Cell 5’ Library Kit (10x Genomics)

Sample.Data-Processing: Seurat v5.1.0 in R v4.5.1 Assembly: GRCh38 Supplementary files format and content: h5 files for each sample

Sample.Title: human_CSF_SPMS_4

Channel.Extract-Protocol: A minimum of 3 ml fresh CSF was centrifuged, and the supernatant was frozen separately. Fresh CSF was processed directly. To generate single-cell libraries, cell suspensions were loaded onto the Chromium Single Cell Controller with the Chromium Single Cell 5′ Library & Gel Bead Kit v.1.1/v2 (both from 10X Genomics) in adherence to the manufacturer's guidelines.The fresh PMS CSF samples were processed individually using the Single Cell 5’ Library Kit with a single index. Single Cell 5’ Library Kit (10x Genomics)

Sample.Data-Processing: Seurat v5.1.0 in R v4.5.1 Assembly: GRCh38 Supplementary files format and content: h5 files for each sample

Series.Title: A CSF Disease-Associated Macrophage Signature defines Progressive Multiple Sclerosis
Series.Summary: This SuperSeries is composed of the SubSeries listed below.
Series.Type: Expression profiling by high throughput sequencing
